applies_to: ai-governance plugin, all skills, all versions

locked_invariant.note: No plugin run, skill, or connector may set this to true.

review_outcome_vs_kfsa_separation.rule: ReviewOutcome.FIX and KFSA.FIX are distinct values with distinct meanings. No automatic mapping between the two vocabularies is permitted anywhere in this plugin.

enforcement: Structurally enforced at the execution boundary (see app/api/plugins/[pluginId]/skills/[skillId]/runs/route.ts) and re-checked in scripts/validate-plugins.ts. Declaring this policy file does not by itself enforce anything — enforcement is in code.
